context.usage: Tap/drag feed interaction anchor; communicates hunger state.

state_rules: full: seed pixels cover about 70% of bowl interior
half: seed pixels cover about 35% of bowl interior

acceptance_criteria: State sheet is exactly 48x10px (3 states × 16x10) with 0px spacing.
Bowl outline is 1px using #1D2B53; bowl fill uses #C2C3C7 and rim detail uses #AB5236.
Each state is visually distinct at 1x scale and remains legible on #FFF1E8 background.

reference_images.label: seed_object_doc
reference_images.purpose: Seed shape, bowl fill states, and feed interaction prop anchor.

reference_images.label: care_system_doc
reference_images.purpose: Feed, clean, and pet interaction timing plus UI icon anchor.

reference_images.label: cage_object_doc
reference_images.purpose: Cage layout, perch, bowl placement, and floor bounds anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteSheetBundle for obstacles asset loading with nearest-neighbor sampling and deterministic z-order.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load obstacles/seed_bowl_3state.png through AssetServer and store the handle under seed_bowl_3state.
runtime_notes: Spawn care props and particles as separate entities so feed, clean, and pet logic can toggle visibility without atlas mutation.
Register manifest execution_order in a startup resource so build order stays deterministic during content validation.
Read frame size and bounds from specs.dimensions_px rather than texture metadata during runtime checks.
